guide_resume_instruction.summary: Independent verification confirms all factual claims in your exit report. Hashes match, 13/13 tasks Disabled, bundle verifies, env var persisted, state.json consistent. Before you commit STATUS.md, two maturity gaps must be closed: (1) the evidence file the XML mandated at 0.10.v2 was never written to disk, and (2) your proposed STATUS content omits the template-specified Execution Log entry. Two minor enhancements are also recommended. After you fix these, commit STATUS.md and the exit report with a targeted git add, then report back with the new commit hash.

correction.issue: XML 0.10.v2 <evidence> clause directs: "Append to phase2_gates/evidence/platform_separation_stage0_baseline.json under key vikunja.fleet_reports_project_id = 8." You marked 0.10.v2 PASS but did not create or update this file. Guide verified the path does not exist.
correction.required_action: Create docs/phase2_gates/evidence/platform_separation_stage0_baseline.json — actually, confirm exact path: C:\Users\mrbla\BlarAI\phase2_gates\evidence\platform_separation_stage0_baseline.json. Write a well-structured JSON baseline capturing ALL Stage 0 evidence in one file (not just the Vikunja field). Suggested schema: { "stage": 0, "completed_utc": "<your UTC timestamp>", "branch_at_completion": "chore/platform-extraction", "head_at_completion": "d0dc1c7", "tag": { "name": "pre-platform-extract", "object_sha": "ce2ec58" }, "recovery_anchors": { "bundle": { "path": "C:\\Users\\mrbla\\backups\\BlarAI_pre_extract.bundle", "sha256": "C051CCFB...D7707", "size_bytes": 446552451 }, "oog_zip": { "path": "C:\\Users\\mrbla\\backups\\blarai_oog_20260424_171721.zip", "sha256": "15B4B9A1...29A8", "size_bytes": 60366033 }, "task_xml_exports": { "path": "C:\\Users\\mrbla\\backups\\scheduled_tasks_export\\", "count": 13 }, "manifest": { "path": "C:\\Users\\mrbla\\backups\\pre_extract_manifest.txt" } }, "fleet_state": { "fleet_paused": true, "scheduled_tasks_disabled_count": 13, "scheduled_tasks_total_count": 13 }, "vikunja": { "fleet_reports_project_id": 8 }, "state_json_schema": { "schema_version": 1, "required_fields_present": true }, "env": { "vikunja_pass_persisted_to_user_scope": true, "length": 23 }, "anomalies_reference": "See STATUS.md Anomalies section for A1, A2, A3." } This is MORE than 0.10.v2 literally required — the XML only mandated the Vikunja key — but per the LA's "mature not minimal" directive, the full baseline in one evidence file is strictly better than a single-field file. Write it, confirm Test-Path returns True.
correction.source_citation: 01_STAGE0_PREFLIGHT.xml work item 0.10.v2 <evidence> clause; LA directive "mature not minimal".

correction.issue: Proposed STATUS.md content omits an Execution Log entry. STATUS.md §Execution Log template explicitly says "Append a dated entry at the end of each stage session."
correction.required_action: Append two entries to STATUS.md §Execution Log in the template's exact format, e.g.: [2026-04-24 HH:MM] Stage 0 started. Session model: <your model ID>. Observations: fleet was already paused pre-execution; 7 worktrees drained by Lead Architect immediately prior. [2026-04-24 HH:MM] Stage 0 complete. Commits: BlarAI d0dc1c7 (pause), branch chore/platform-extraction @ d0dc1c7. Anomalies: A1 (mcpServers key), A2 (Vikunja CLI env injection), A3 (S4U elevation — CRITICAL for Stage 4.7). Evidence: phase2_gates/evidence/platform_separation_stage0_baseline.json. Use real UTC times from your session start/end. Do NOT invent placeholders.
correction.source_citation: STATUS.md §Execution Log template block; LA directive "mature not minimal".

suggestions.suggestion: Include bundle size in the Recovery Anchors table row for the bundle (size_bytes 446552451). Currently only the OOG zip has size recorded — asymmetric. Mature symmetry: both anchors carry path + hash + size.

Commit docs/platform_separation/ea_outputs/STAGE0_EXIT_REPORT.xml as part of the Stage 0 commit so the exit report is a permanent on-branch audit artifact, not just a transient file in an untracked directory. This is the mature path — the exit report is the primary record of what the stage actually did.

commit_instructions.step: Use TARGETED git add. Do NOT run `git add .` or `git add -A` — the workspace has untracked directories (`docs/platform_separation/Temp for responses/`) that are the LA's scratch and must not land in the commit.

Stage exactly these paths: - docs/platform_separation/STATUS.md (after applying corrections #1 and #2 + suggestion s1) - phase2_gates/evidence/platform_separation_stage0_baseline.json (new file per correction #1) - docs/platform_separation/ea_outputs/STAGE0_EXIT_REPORT.xml (per suggestion s2)
Commit message: `docs(platform_separation): Stage 0 complete — recovery anchors, 13/13 tasks Disabled, 3 anomalies recorded`
Verify with `git log --oneline -3` — expect the new commit at HEAD of chore/platform-extraction, preceded by d0dc1c7 (pause).
Report the new commit hash to the Lead Architect and stop. Do NOT start Stage 1. A new Guide instance and a fresh Executor session will be launched for Stage 1.

guide_resume_instruction.proceed_authorization: PROCEED — apply corrections 1 and 2, apply suggestions s1 and s2, then commit per commit_instructions. Report the new commit hash at exit.
